items.title: Laowa 4.5-10mm f/2.8 CF Zoom Fisheye Announced – Dual Fisheye Look for APS-C and MFT

items.title: The Story Behind The Last Photograph of Oscar Wilde on His Death Bed
items.summary: The last known photograph of literary icon Oscar Wilde was taken on his death bed in a Paris hotel room using a borrowed camera and a volatile early flash, mere hours after he passed away. [Read More]

items.title: The Hidden World of Insect Wings Revealed by Macro Photographer
items.summary: A photographer uses lighting and special equipment to capture something not usually seen by the human eye: the intricate patterns, texture, and color found on insect wings. [Read More]
